message:
feat(ui): add RchConsole wrapper for context-aware rich output (bd-3u68)

Implements RchConsole struct that wraps rich_rust's Console with
automatic context awareness:

Context queries:
- is_rich() - check if rich output is available
- is_colored() - check if colors are available
- is_machine() - check if in Hook/Machine mode
- context() - get the detected OutputContext
- width() - get terminal width

Rich output methods (rich-ui feature):
- print_rich() - print with markup parsing (interactive only)
- print_renderable() - print tables, panels, etc.
- rule() - horizontal rule with title
- line() - blank line

Fallback output methods:
- print_or_plain() - rich/plain fallback
- print_plain() - stderr output (unless machine mode)
- print_success/warning/info() - status messages with icons
- print_error() - always outputs to stderr

Machine output:
- print_json() - outputs to stdout for --json flag

Uses rch-common's OutputContext for detection and integrates with
Icons and RchTheme for consistent styling.

All 15 tests pass. Closes bd-3u68, unblocks 12+ downstream issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
